Last War VS Scanner.description: Application window and browser page title.

Local-only processing. Recordings and ex.translation: Traitement local uniquement. Les enregistrements et les données extraites restent sur ce PC.
Local-only processing. Recordings and ex.description: Privacy note below the Streamlit app heading.

MP4 path.description: Label for the input recording file path.

Output folder.description: Label for the folder where extracted files are saved.

Local teammate roster.description: Label for the local alliance roster file path.

Alliance Members.description: Button and dialog title for managing alliance members.

Alliance members.description: Heading in the alliance member editor.

Could not open members.description: Error dialog title shown when the roster cannot be read.

Could not open members: {error}.description: Inline roster loading error. {error} is the system error message.

One alliance member per line.translation: Un membre de l'alliance par ligne
One alliance member per line.description: Label for the multiline roster editor.

Paste a column from Google Sheets. Edit.translation: Collez une colonne de Google Sheets. Modifiez les lignes pour ajouter, renommer ou supprimer des membres.
Paste a column from Google Sheets. Edit.description: Help text explaining the Streamlit roster editor.

Save Members.description: Button that saves changes to the alliance roster.

Saved {count} alliance member(s)..description: Success message after saving the roster. {count} is the number saved.

Could not save members.description: Error dialog title shown when roster saving fails.

Could not save members: {error}.description: Inline roster saving error. {error} is the system error message.

Process recording.description: Primary button that begins video analysis.

Opening video.description: Initial progress message while opening a recording.

Selecting frames and running offline OCR.translation: Sélection des images et exécution de l'OCR hors ligne...
Selecting frames and running offline OCR.description: Busy message while video frames are selected and read locally.

Keep.description: Checkbox column controlling whether a result row is included in exports.

Review required.description: Checkbox column indicating that an extracted result needs manual review.

Correct cells directly. Clear **Keep** t.translation: Corrigez directement les cellules. Désactivez **Conserver** pour supprimer une ligne des exportations.
Correct cells directly. Clear **Keep** t.description: Instructions for editing extracted results in Streamlit; Keep is a column name.

Remember reviewed teammate names.translation: Mémoriser les noms des coéquipiers révisés
Remember reviewed teammate names.description: Button that stores corrected names and OCR aliases.

Saved names and OCR aliases locally to {.translation: Noms enregistrés et alias OCR localement dans {path}
Saved names and OCR aliases locally to {.description: Confirmation after saving reviewed names. {path} is the roster file path.

Export reviewed CSV.description: Download button for reviewed results in CSV format.

Export reviewed Excel.description: Download button for reviewed results in Excel format.

Source verification.description: Heading for checking extracted data against source frames.

Frame.description: Label for selecting a source video frame.

Day {number}.description: Display name for a daily ranking slot. {number} is from 1 to 6.

Weekly Overall.description: Display name for the overall weekly ranking slot.

Push Days.description: Display name for the combined ranking of selected push days.

Name.description: Alliance member name column heading or field label.

Points.description: Score column heading or field label.

Push day.description: Toggle marking a daily ranking as part of the push total.

Drop MP4 here.description: Prompt on an empty recording drop area.

Browse.description: Button that opens a recording file picker.

Add members individually or in a batch..translation: Ajoutez des membres individuellement ou par lots. Double-cliquez sur un nom pour le modifier sur place.
Add members individually or in a batch..description: Instructions at the top of the member editor.

Add Multiple Entries.description: Button and dialog title for pasting several member names.

Remove All.description: Button that removes every alliance member.

Search.description: Label for filtering the alliance member list.

Actions.description: Column heading for member management buttons.

Cancel.description: Button that closes a dialog without applying changes.

Add member.description: Action for adding one alliance member.

No members yet. Add one or add multiple.translation: Aucun membre pour l'instant. Ajoutez une ou plusieurs entrées pour commencer.
No members yet. Add one or add multiple.description: Empty-state message in the member editor.

No members match your search..translation: Aucun membre ne correspond à votre recherche.
No members match your search..description: Message shown when the member filter has no results.

Delete.description: Button that deletes one alliance member.

Other Names.description: Button for editing alternate spellings of a member name.

Other Names ({count}).description: Button for alternate names. {count} is the number of aliases.

Duplicate member.description: Warning title when a member name already exists.

\"{name}\" is already in the member list.translation: "{name}" est déjà dans la liste des membres.
\"{name}\" is already in the member list.description: Duplicate-name warning. {name} is the entered member name.

Add.description: Button that adds the entered member or alias.

Add multiple members.description: Heading in the batch member entry dialog.

Paste one member per line. Existing name.translation: Collez un membre par ligne. Les noms existants et les lignes en double sont ignorés.

Add Members.description: Button that applies a batch of member names.

Name (Z-A).description: Member column heading when sorted descending by name.

Name (A-Z).description: Member column heading when sorted ascending by name.

Remove all members.description: Confirmation dialog title for clearing the roster.

Remove all alliance members? This cannot.translation: Supprimer tous les membres de l'alliance ? Cela ne peut pas être annulé après la sauvegarde.
Remove all alliance members? This cannot.description: Confirmation warning before clearing the roster.

Other Names - {name}.description: Alias editor window title. {name} is the member being edited.

Other names for {name}.description: Alias editor heading. {name} is the member being edited.

Add spelling or OCR variations for this.translation: Ajoutez des variantes orthographiques ou OCR pour ce membre.

Delete Selected.description: Button that deletes the selected alias.

ISO week.description: Label for selecting the ISO calendar week.

Drop six daily ranking videos and one we.translation: Déposez six vidéos de classement quotidiennes et une vidéo de classement hebdomadaire. Ils sont traités en file d'attente sur ce PC.
Drop six daily ranking videos and one we.description: Desktop app instructions below the main heading.

Open combined push ranking.description: Description on the card that opens the combined push-day results.

Copy Selected Table.description: Button that copies the currently visible results table.

Copy All Week Tables.translation: Copier toutes les tables de la semaine
Copy All Week Tables.description: Button that copies all daily and weekly result tables.

Buy Crocco a coffee.description: Title of the optional support QR-code window; Crocco is a proper name.

Processing in progress.description: Warning title when an action is unavailable during processing.

Wait for queued recordings before changi.translation: Attendez les enregistrements en file d'attente avant de changer de semaine.
Wait for queued recordings before changi.description: Warning shown when changing weeks while recordings are queued.

Could not open week.description: Error title when saved weekly data cannot be loaded.

{week} loaded..description: Status after loading a saved week. {week} is an ISO week identifier.

saved recording.description: Fallback filename tooltip for results restored from history.

Ready - hover for file.description: Drop-card state indicating results are ready and a filename tooltip is available.

{count} push day(s) selected for {week}..description: Status after changing push-day selection. {count} is selected days and {week} is the ISO week.

Edit result.description: Dialog title for editing an extracted rank or points value.

{field}:.description: Label in an edit dialog. {field} is the localized field name.

Invalid value.description: Error title for invalid edited result data.

{field} must be a whole number..description: Validation error. {field} is the localized numeric field name.

Name cannot be empty..translation: Le nom ne peut pas être vide.
Name cannot be empty..description: Validation error for a blank member name.

Saved edit in {week}, {slot}..description: Status after editing a result. {week} is an ISO week and {slot} a localized ranking slot.

Edit.description: Context-menu action for editing a result name.

Add to alliance.description: Context-menu action that adds an extracted name to the roster.

No unassigned members.description: Disabled menu item when no roster member can be assigned.

Assign from alliance.description: Context-menu submenu for assigning a roster member.

Edit name.description: Dialog title for correcting an extracted member name.

Saved name \"{name}\" for {week}, {slot}.description: Status after correcting a result name. Placeholders identify the name, ISO week, and localized slot.

Member unavailable.description: Error title when a roster member disappeared before assignment.

Alliance member \"{name}\" no longer exi.translation: Le membre de l'alliance "{name}" n'existe plus.
Alliance member \"{name}\" no longer exi.description: Assignment error. {name} is the missing roster member.

Assigned \"{alias}\" to {member} and ref.translation: Attribué « {alias} » à {member} et jeu(s) de résultats {count} actualisé.
Assigned \"{alias}\" to {member} and ref.description: Status after assigning an OCR name. Placeholders are the alias, canonical member, and changed result count.

Added \"{name}\" to the alliance and ref.translation: Ajout de « {name} » à l'alliance et actualisation du ou des jeux de résultats {count}.
Added \"{name}\" to the alliance and ref.description: Status after adding an extracted name to the roster. {count} is changed result sets.

Choose a recording.description: Title of the MP4 file picker.

MP4 video.description: File type label in the recording picker.

Cancelling....description: Drop-card state while stopping video processing.

Cancelling {slot}....description: Status while stopping a slot. {slot} is the localized ranking slot.

Cleared {slot}..description: Status after removing a slot's recording and results.

Unsupported file.description: Error title for a dropped file that is not a valid MP4.

Please drop an existing .mp4 video..description: Error message explaining the required recording format.

Queued....description: Drop-card state while a recording waits for processing.

Queued {filename} for {slot}. {count} wa.translation: {filename} mis en file d'attente pour {slot}. {count} en attente.
Queued {filename} for {slot}. {count} wa.description: Queue status with recording filename, localized slot, and waiting count.

Cancelled queued video for {slot}. {coun.translation: Vidéo en file d'attente annulée pour {slot}. {count} en attente.
Cancelled queued video for {slot}. {coun.description: Status after removing a recording from the queue.

Opening {filename} for {slot}....description: Status before processing begins; placeholders are filename and localized slot.

Processing....description: Drop-card state while a recording is analyzed.

OCR at {seconds:.2f}s.description: Processing progress at a video timestamp. {seconds} is elapsed video time.

Processing at {seconds:.2f}s.description: Friendly drop-card progress at a video timestamp.

{slot}: {message}.description: Overall status combining a localized ranking slot and progress message.

{slot} complete: {count} result(s) from.description: Completion status with localized slot, result count, and source filename.

{slot} processing failed.description: Status when processing a localized ranking slot fails.

Failed - hover for file.description: Drop-card failure state with filename available as a tooltip.

Could not process {slot}.description: Error dialog title for a failed localized ranking slot.

Cancelled {slot}..description: Status after processing for a localized ranking slot is cancelled.

Copied the {slot} table to the clipboard.translation: Copie de la table {slot} dans le presse-papiers.
Copied the {slot} table to the clipboard.description: Status after copying one localized result table.

Copied all {count} tables for {week} to.translation: Copie de toutes les tables {count} pour {week} dans le presse-papiers.
Copied all {count} tables for {week} to.description: Status after copying all tables. {count} is table count and {week} the ISO week.
